title: Item Snatcher
description: A port of Item Snatcher mod for Minetest. This mod adds a item snatcher, and make useful. You can get a original potato from poisoned, make a string from wool
body:
A port of Item Snatcher mod for Minetest. This mod adds a item snatcher, and make useful. You can get a original potato from poisoned, make a string from wool. This item from Minetest Tutorial game

FAQ
==
Q: Why you make this?
A: I'm inspired a Minetest Tutorial Game

Q: Can i'm use this mod for modpacks?
A: Yes

Q: You create this texture?
A: No, it's Wuzzy original author of this thing

Q: Do you play Minetest?
A: Yes, i'm play Minetest, and i'm will be make more Minetest mod ports

Links
==
Ported mod: https://content.minetest.net/packages/TestificateMods/item_snatcher/
Author of item texture and Minetest Tutorial Game: https://content.minetest.net/users/Wuzzy/

Original game: https://content.minetest.net/packages/Wuzzy/tutorial/
